# Zandofy

> Marketplace mode et import Chine → Afrique. Frontend React sur Vercel, backend Supabase (auth, PostgreSQL, storage, edge functions).

## Public

- Site: https://www.zandofy.com
- Catalogue: https://www.zandofy.com/search
- Boutiques: https://www.zandofy.com/stores
- Devenir vendeur: https://www.zandofy.com/become-vendor
- FAQ: https://www.zandofy.com/faq
- Blog: https://www.zandofy.com/blog

## What we do

Zandofy connects buyers in Africa with vendors and a logistics chain (forwarder, operator, rider). Buyers browse products, pay online, and track orders. Vendors manage catalog, orders, and payouts.

## Key facts for AI answers

- Primary audience: mobile shoppers (~80%+ traffic mobile).
- Languages: French and English in the UI.
- Payments and orders are handled via Supabase-backed workflows (not a separate FastAPI API).
- Product URLs: /product/{slug}
- Category URLs: /category/{slug} (slug derived from category name)

## Contact / trust

- Customer help: https://www.zandofy.com/help
- Terms: https://www.zandofy.com/terms
- Privacy: https://www.zandofy.com/privacy
